biography: Afreen is a master calligrapher and fine art letterer specializing in contemporary and traditional calligraphy. With a passion for precision and aesthetic excellence, Afreen creates stunning hand-drawn artworks, custom invitations, and bespoke lettering designs for discerning clients .
mission: To preserve the art of hand-drawn calligraphy while infusing modern creativity. Every piece is crafted with intention, celebrating the beauty of the written word and bringing personalized elegance to meaningful moments.

timeline.title: Artistic Journey Begins
timeline.description: Started exploring calligraphy as a personal art form, developing a unique signature style blending traditional techniques with contemporary aesthetics.

timeline.title: Professional Studio Launch
timeline.description: Opened commission-based studio for custom calligraphy artworks, invitations, and personalized lettering projects.

timeline.title: International Recognition
timeline.description: Gained global clientele through social media presence, showcasing fine art calligraphy pieces and custom design work.

achievements: Creator of distinctive calligraphy style recognizable across social platforms.
Completed 500+ custom commission projects for clients worldwide.
Specialized expertise in both Western and traditional calligraphy forms.
